metadata.description: Anti-bluff challenges validating MeTube functionality really works - downloads complete, queue updates in real-time, form re-enables after failures

challenges.name: Download Completes Successfully
challenges.description: Verify that a video download actually completes and the file exists on disk. Anti-bluff: must stat the actual file, not just check API status.

inputs.name: test_video_url
inputs.description: Known short video URL for testing

outputs.name: file_exists
outputs.description: Whether downloaded file exists on disk

assertions.message: Downloaded file must exist on disk
Downloaded file must be at least 1KB

challenges.name: Form Re-enables After Download Failure
challenges.description: Verify that the download form becomes re-enabled after a failed download. Anti-bluff: actually try to add a bad URL and confirm the form is usable afterwards.

outputs.name: form_disabled_initial
outputs.description: Whether form is disabled during submit

outputs.name: url_field_has_value
outputs.description: Whether URL field retains the failed URL

assertions.message: Form must be re-enabled after failure
URL field must retain failed URL for retry

challenges.name: Retried Download Appears Immediately in Queue
challenges.description: Verify that when retrying a failed download, it appears in the queue immediately with 'preparing' status. Anti-bluff: check the actual DOM/API, not just console logs.

outputs.name: item_visible_immediately
outputs.description: Whether retried item appears in queue right away

assertions.message: Retried item must appear in queue immediately

challenges.name: Queue Updates in Real-Time
challenges.description: Verify that queue status updates are reflected in the UI within a reasonable time. Anti-bluff: poll the actual queue API and confirm progress values change.

outputs.name: progress_changes
outputs.description: Whether progress percentage changes during download

assertions.message: Queue must show status updates during download

challenges.name: Cookie Upload Works Correctly
challenges.description: Verify that cookie upload via landing page actually enables restricted content downloads. Anti-bluff: upload real cookies and try downloading a members-only video.

challenges.name: History Persists Aborted Downloads
challenges.description: Verify that aborted/cancelled downloads appear in history with status 'aborted'. Anti-bluff: actually cancel a download and check history API returns it.

outputs.name: aborted_item_exists
outputs.description: Whether aborted item appears in history

assertions.message: Cancelled download must have status 'aborted' in history
History must contain at least one item

challenges.name: Bulk Operations Work Correctly
challenges.description: Verify that bulk delete/clear operations actually remove items from queue and history. Anti-bluff: add multiple items, run bulk delete, verify they're gone from API.

outputs.name: items_after_bulk_delete
outputs.description: Number of items remaining after bulk delete

assertions.message: Must successfully add at least 2 items
Bulk delete must remove all items
